release_notes: V14.44 build 209 standardises the official product branding to Leah 2R Displays across the firmware identity, startup screens, setup hotspot, mDNS alias, default device name, local display messages, Web UI, Wi-Fi page and WhatsApp test messages. Known legacy default device names stored in NVS are migrated to Leah 2R Displays while caregiver-defined custom names are preserved. Build 208 alarm snooze reset-on-clear behaviour and all final Build 207 display, trend, Nightscout, sensor SAGE, IOB/COB and OTA safety functions are preserved.
